name: Service Contract
description: Simple service agreement with two party signatures

variables.governing_law: Applicable jurisdiction (e.g. State of New York)

kwargs.text: This Service Agreement (the "Agreement") is entered into as of {{start_date}}, by and between {{party_a}}, located at {{address_a}} ("Party A"), and {{party_b}}, located at {{address_b}} ("Party B").

Party A agrees to provide the following services to Party B: {{service}}. The engagement shall commence on {{start_date}} and continue through {{end_date}}, unless terminated earlier in accordance with this Agreement.
In consideration for the services rendered, Party B shall pay Party A the total amount of {{value}} according to the payment schedule mutually agreed upon by both parties.
Each party agrees to hold in confidence and not disclose to any third party any confidential information received from the other party in connection with this Agreement.
Either party may terminate this Agreement upon thirty (30) days written notice. Upon termination, Party B shall pay for all services rendered up to the termination date.
This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of {{governing_law}}.
